title: Newsletter — NCMA Fort Worth
seo_title: NCMA Fort Worth Newsletter — Weekly Procurement Insights for Contract Professionals
seo_description: Subscribe to the NCMA Fort Worth newsletter. Weekly insights on certification prep, procurement trends, government contracting news, and chapter events for Fort Worth metro professionals.

props.heading: Latest Newsletter Issues
props.description: Catch up on recent articles and insights from the NCMA Fort Worth newsletter.

items.title: The FAR Is Being Rewritten — What Fort Worth Contractors Must Know
items.description: The first-ever comprehensive overhaul of the Federal Acquisition Regulation is underway. Plain language, stripped-down rules, faster acquisitions — here’s what it means for DFW.

items.title: SOCOM’s AI Revolution — What It Means for DFW Defense Contractors
items.description: SOCOM is integrating AI and autonomy ‘at every level.’ New procurement pathways, expedited acquisition, and opportunities for DFW defense contractors.

items.title: Maintaining Human Connection in an AI-Accelerated World
items.description: As AI automates procurement workflows, the human skills of trust-building, negotiation, and relationship management become more valuable — not less.

items.title: Is CPCM Worth It? 3 Reasons to Get Certified in 2026
items.description: The CPCM certification is the gold standard in contract management. Here’s why 2026 is the year to start your journey — and how Fort Worth professionals are getting it done.

items.title: AI Is Reshaping Procurement — What DFW Contractors Need to Know
items.description: From automated compliance checks to predictive risk analysis, AI tools are changing how we manage contracts. A look at what’s here now and what’s coming next.

items.title: World Congress 2026 Preview — Lake Buena Vista, Jul 26–29
items.description: Everything you need to know about NCMA’s premier annual conference: sessions, networking, early bird registration, and tips for first-time attendees.

items.title: 5 Skills Every Contract Manager Needs in 2026
items.description: AI literacy, data analytics, negotiation psychology, cybersecurity basics, and cross-functional collaboration — the skills that will set you apart this year.

items.title: CFCM vs CCCM — Which Certification Fits Your Career?
items.description: Federal or commercial? CFCM is FAR-focused for government contracting. CCCM is UCC-focused for private sector. Here’s how to choose the right path.

items.title: FAR Update Alert — What Changed and What It Means for You
items.description: A quick breakdown of the latest Federal Acquisition Regulation case updates. Compliance isn’t optional — it’s your competitive advantage.

props.heading: What Members Are Saying
props.subheading: Hear from contract management professionals across the DFW metro.

testimonials.name: Government Contracting Officer
testimonials.text: The NCMA chapter events are the best networking I’ve found in DFW for procurement professionals. Real connections, not just business card exchanges.

testimonials.name: Defense Industry Program Manager
testimonials.text: The certification prep resources and study groups helped me pass my CPCM on the first try. Couldn’t have done it without this community.

testimonials.name: Procurement Specialist
testimonials.text: I look forward to the weekly newsletter — it’s the only one I actually read. The FAR updates alone save me hours of research every month.

props.heading: NCMA Fort Worth Newsletter
props.subheading: Join 94 Fort Worth procurement professionals. Weekly insights on FAR updates, certifications, and DFW contracting news — every Tuesday.
props.successMessage: Welcome! You’ll receive your first issue next Tuesday.
